intent: Add an audit-log guarantee (every_llm_decision_has_audit_log) to the CreateTask workflow.

asserts: The guarantee is declared in the canonical IR produced from the evolved spec.
Arch deterministically regenerates the CreateTask workflow under ownership boundaries and emits a guarantee test scaffold traceable to the IR.
arch check reports no hash / missing-file / static-guarantee drift for the regenerated artifacts.
verifierBacked.verifiedBy: arch parse --emit-ir -> canonical arch.ir.v1 -> generate -> arch check

doesNotVerify: Runtime emission of the audit log on a live, non-deterministic LLM decision path.
Behavioral verification requires exercising the real LLM decision path under load, deferred to Phase 2+.
